title.proposed: Yakama River Game Camera Stream Inundation Data
title.standard: Timeseries Unlabeled and Labeled Photos, Modeled Water Surface Fractions, and Metadata of Variably Inundated Streams Across the Yakima River Basin

notes.proposed: This dataset contains game camera data related to the Yakama River, including water surface fractions and labeled wildlife images collected using methods like Mask2Former and YOLO.
notes.standard: ESS-DIVE dataset supporting a paper on monitoring river flow status using low-cost wildlife cameras and image segmentation AI. This package is useful for testing CKAN registration from a dataset that combines unstructured image collections, labeled image training data, CSV model outputs, file-level metadata, and manuscript-associated documentation.

standard.value: Monitoring river flow status using low-cost wildlife camera and image segmentation artificial intelligence

title.proposed: Warming and Snow Loss Impacts on Groundwater in Colorado Headwater
title.standard: Data From: Warming and Snow Loss Increase Reliance on Old Groundwater in a Colorado River Headwater

notes.proposed: This dataset contains information related to the impact of warming and snow loss on groundwater in Colorado headwater areas, including watershed elevation data and analysis scripts.
notes.standard: ESS-DIVE data and code archive associated with a Nature Geoscience paper on warming, snow loss, and groundwater contributions in a Colorado River headwater. This package is useful for testing CKAN records with nested scientific code directories, model-input folders, notebook resources, geospatial/snow data processing scripts, observational CSVs, Excel sheets, and license/readme files.

tags.note: judge tags_score=4; F1=0.182 (P=0.20 R=0.17); missing=['colorado-river', 'ess-dive', 'nature-geoscience', 'parflow', 'snow-hydrology']; extra=['colorado', 'headwater', 'snow loss', 'warming']

standard.value: Warming and snow loss increase reliance on old groundwater in a Colorado River headwater

title.standard: Aerial and Processed Model Data from Port Arthur, May 2025

notes.standard: ESS-DIVE SETx-UIFL dataset containing aerial imagery and processed model data from Port Arthur, Texas. It is useful for testing CKAN registration of high-volume unstructured drone imagery, processed model folders, video resources, geospatial field-data provenance, and links to disaster-debris and aerial photogrammetry publications.

standard.value: A framework to enhance disaster debris estimation with AI and aerial photogrammetry
International Journal of Disaster Risk Reduction
The dataset is listed in SETx-UIFL code and datasets; the associated paper is methodologically related to AI and aerial photogrammetry debris estimation.

title.proposed: Port Arthur Neighborhood RTK Drone Flight Images
title.standard: Real-Time Kinematic Drone-Collected Data and Processed Models of Port Arthur Coastal Neighborhood and Pleasure Island Golf Course, June 2024

notes.proposed: This dataset contains images and associated files from an RTK drone flight over the Port Arthur neighborhood, including visible and multispectral images, as well as GNSS/PPK observation and timestamp files.
notes.standard: ESS-DIVE SETx-UIFL dataset containing RTK drone-captured data and processed model assets for Port Arthur, Texas and Pleasure Island Golf Course. This package is useful for testing CKAN registration of nested drone-photo directories, multispectral TIFF imagery, raw GNSS/PPK files, image metadata, and geospatial field campaign data.

tags.note: judge tags_score=4; F1=0.0 (P=0.00 R=0.00); missing=['ess-dive', 'multispectral-imagery', 'photogrammetry', 'port-arthur', 'rtk-drone', 'setx-uifl']; extra=['aerial imagery', 'multispectral imaging', 'port arthur neighborhood', 'rtk drone']

standard.value: A framework to enhance disaster debris estimation with AI and aerial photogrammetry
International Journal of Disaster Risk Reduction
The paper URL is methodologically associated with aerial photogrammetry and AI debris-estimation workflows; this dataset provides related SETx-UIFL RTK drone source data.

title.proposed: CROCUS Forward Scatter Disdrometer Data at Argonne National Laboratory Prairie Site
title.standard: CROCUS Forward Scatter Disdrometer Data at Argonne National Laboratory Prairie Site

notes.proposed: This dataset contains CROCUS forward scatter disdrometer observations for the Argonne National Laboratory Prairie Site. The data is provided in NetCDF format and includes daily files for various dates. The dataset also includes a manifest file with MD5 checksums for integrity validation.
notes.standard: ESS-DIVE CROCUS UIFL dataset containing time-indexed atmospheric disdrometer NetCDF files from the Argonne National Laboratory Prairie Site. This package is useful for testing CKAN registration of large collections of daily NetCDF resources, atmospheric instrument metadata, urban field laboratory project metadata, and file manifests.

tags.note: judge tags_score=3; F1=0.2 (P=0.25 R=0.17); missing=['atmospheric-measurements', 'disdrometer', 'ess-dive', 'netcdf', 'urban-climate']; extra=['argonne national laboratory', 'forward scatter disdrometer', 'prairie site']

standard.value: The Community Research on Climate and Urban Science Urban Integrated Field Laboratory
Bulletin of the American Meteorological Society
This is an instrument data product from the CROCUS Urban Integrated Field Laboratory; use it to test instrument time-series metadata and NetCDF resources.
